introSection: Palindrome is a Gerstlauer Infinity Coaster currently under construction at Cotaland in Austin, Texas, USA. It is slated to open in 2026.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In November 2021, Cotaland announced the addition of Palindrome.

Vertical construction began in late spring 2024.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a shuttle design, with the zero-g stall over the race track, and a wave turn also over the race track, a zero-g roll follow after, then the train reaches the vertical hop-stall, and it goes in reverse going through the same element.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders per train.

fullText:
Palindrome is a Gerstlauer Infinity Coaster currently under construction at Cotaland in Austin, Texas, USA. It is slated to open in 2026.

In November 2021, Cotaland announced the addition of Palindrome.

Vertical construction began in late spring 2024.

The ride is a shuttle design, with the zero-g stall over the race track, and a wave turn also over the race track, a zero-g roll follow after, then the train reaches the vertical hop-stall, and it goes in reverse going through the same element.

3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders per train.
